text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day after training, I think about working late
to take care of some work that's piled up.
However...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Aah, I can't take another step...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I think I'll just... use your office for a little nap...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Buh-bye...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Of course I am. It's against the Rules of Sei for
you to sneak a peek at my sleeping face.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'd like my wake-up call in two hours, please.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I end up getting kicked out. With nothing else
to do, I go for a walk around town.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This place feels different from usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a panic, I buy a present for Seiun Sky and make
it back to campus two hours later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Now my office is different too?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays! ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hah, shocked you good, huh? My surprise was a
huge success! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I just did a little decorating, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I was worried about a certain trainer missing all
this holiday cheer due to work, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Actually, it seemed like you didn't even realize
what day it was in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So I decided to surprise ya. ☆ Heehee. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
A proper trainer is supposed to bear seasonal
events in mind, you know?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yet here you are, forcing your poor trainee to be
the thoughtful one. That's totally unacceptable.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, I did get to see your jaw hit the floor. I
guess that makes up for it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Anywaaay...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What's that you're holding? I've never seen that
bag before...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I knew it!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I really did! I knew you'd get me something!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad I believed in you enough to boot you
outta here. ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So! What did you get me? Gimme a hint!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We have some fun playing a guessing game, with
Seiun Sky trying to figure out what her present is.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Actually, this isn't the only surprise I prepared. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Kill the lights!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: C'mon! Turn 'em off! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Thanks. Okay... here goes nothing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A sea of glittering stars appears from floor to
ceiling across the entire room.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Pretty festive, huh? My present to you is this
starry night!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Don't get misty-eyed on me yet! Look over
there...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look in the direction she's pointing to see one
star in particular sparkling conspicuously.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's another present from me. Let's go catch
that star!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sky pulls me toward the light. And, as it slowly
envelops us...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Now look in your hand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I open my hand to see what's inside...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, a fake one, but yes. It's made out of acrylic.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Since I'm still just a kid, this is the most I could do
for you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But the star... It's kinda nice, right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And, being the amazing director that I am,
getting a star to show its true shine was
easy-peasy.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Maybe it's a little too cheap.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
To take you further behind the scenes, I borrowed
this indoor planetarium from someone.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoops! Did I just wreck the mood?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: For real?
choice_data_list: This is the prettiest of all the stars I know.
This is the prettiest of all the stars I know.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So I guess that means today was a huge success!
Still, one day...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I wanna grab onto a real star. Don't worry, I'll come up with a plan. ♪
